name: Divine Focus
notes: Artifact Equipment. Source: The Redeemed Citadel. Set Redeemed (0/3).

name: Celestial Sash
notes: Artifact Equipment. Source: The Redeemed Citadel. Set Redeemed (0/3).

name: Chains of Glory
setBonus: 3 of Set: Forgiveness of the Fallen. You gain up to 3% Power as your health decreases. That bonus is doubled for 15 seconds when a nearby ally falls in battle.
notes: Artifact Equipment. Source: Trial - Zariel's Challenge.

name: Belt of Victory
setBonus: 3 of Set: Forgiveness of the Fallen. You gain up to 3% Power as your health decreases. That bonus is doubled for 15 seconds when a nearby ally falls in battle.
notes: Artifact Equipment. Source: Trial - Zariel's Challenge.

name: The Engine Master's Mantle
setBonus: 3 of Set: Call of Evil. Increases damage dealt by 2.5%. Increases damage dealt by an additional 2.5% against demons, devils, and fiends.
notes: Artifact Equipment. The smell of brimstone still lingers on this cloak, a testament to the dedication of its former owner. Source: The Infernal Citadel.

name: Whip of the Erinyes
setBonus: 3 of Set: Call of Evil. Increases damage dealt by 2.5%. Increases damage dealt by an additional 2.5% against demons, devils, and fiends.
notes: Artifact Equipment. A rope of entanglement, once used by an Erinyes devil, holds securely around the wearer's waist to function as a sturdy belt.

equipBonuses.name: Summon Devil
equipBonuses.description: When struck by a foe you have a 10% chance to summon a devil servant to attack that foe doing 200 magnitude damage. This effect can only trigger once every 30 seconds and does not affect companions.

equipBonuses.name: Summon Devil
equipBonuses.description: When struck by a foe you have a 10% chance to summon a devil servant to attack that foe doing 200 magnitude damage. This effect can only trigger once every 30 seconds and does not affect companions.

equipBonuses.name: Martyr's Might
equipBonuses.description: When your health is below 50%, your Power is increased by 15,000.

equipBonuses.name: Butcher's Focus
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, gain 196 Critical Strike for 10 seconds. (Max stack 10)

equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Pursuit
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, there is a 20% chance you will teleport to a nearby enemy. Can only occur every 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Herald's Defense
equipBonuses.description: You gain 1% Defense for each player in your team. When your teammates are 25' or closer to you, their Defense is increased by 1.

equipBonuses.name: Brute's Might
equipBonuses.description: When you are 25' or closer to your target, your Power is increased by 5,000.

equipBonuses.name: Ghosted
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by a Critical Strike, you have a 10% chance to increase your Maximum Hit Points by 20% and gain 3% Defense for 10 seconds. Disabled in Thay Arena PvP.

equipBonuses.name: Maximized Opportunity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Combat Advantage is increased by 7%.

equipBonuses.name: Eagle's Precision
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Accuracy is 1.5% and Movement Speed increased by 1% for 10 seconds. (Max stack 5)

equipBonuses.name: Champion's Might
equipBonuses.description: When your health is greater than 85%, your Power is increased by 7,500.

equipBonuses.name: Perilous Attraction
equipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your target is pulled towards you for 3 seconds. Applies to a single target and does not stack. Control Immune targets suffer a 20 magnitude Bleed over its duration. Can only occur once every 10 seconds. (Not usable in PVP)

equipBonuses.name: Soul Siphon
equipBonuses.description: Your powers have a 10% chance to siphon life essence from your target, creating a nearby healing orb which can be picked up to restore 3% of your Maximum Hit Points over 5 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Herald's Cry
equipBonuses.description: You gain 1000 Power for each player in your team. When your teammates are 25' or further away from you, their Power is increased by 1,000.

equipBonuses.name: Ruthless Might
equipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 1.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity for 15 seconds. Max 5 Stacks: 7.5% Critical Strike and Critical Severity

equipBonuses.name: Past Regards
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you will be teleported back 25 feet, and will gain 5000 Power for 10 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 500 Power for each enemy you are engaged in battle. (Max of 15 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Herald's Decree
equipBonuses.description: When you have no teammates within 30' of you, your Power and Defense is increased by 5%.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 200 Power for each percent of health you are missing.

equipBonuses.name: Berserker's Might
equipBonuses.description: When you have a Shield or Temp HP, your Power is increased by 8000.

equipBonuses.name: Encounter Reprieve
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Encounter Power cooldowns by 1 second. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Encounter Reprieve
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Encounter Power cooldowns by 1 second. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Killer's Might
equipBonuses.description: When your enemy's health is greater than 75%, your Power is increased by 5,000.

equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, your Power increases by 3000 for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Contender's Might
equipBonuses.description: At the start of combat, your Power is increased by 3000 for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Call of the Nine Hells
equipBonuses.description: At the start of combat, you will call forth denizens of the Nine Hells, summoning them to help you and increasing your Power by 5000 for 15 seconds. (60 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Death Defier's Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 300 Power for each enemy you are engaged in battle. (Max of 15 targets)

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 45 Power for each percent of health you are missing.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Might
equipBonuses.description: Gain 45 Power for each percent of health you are missing.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Remedy
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 10% chance to restore 5% of your Maximum Hit Points. This effect may only occur once every 5 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Defender Guard
equipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Base Damage Boost when struck. Stacks 5 times. When you strike an enemy, the stacks are consumed and you gain -1% Incoming Damage per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

equipBonuses.name: Defender Strike
equipBonuses.description: Gain 1% Incoming Damage when you strike an enemy. Stacks 5 times. When you are struck, the stacks are consumed and you gain 1% Base Damage Boost per stack consumed for 10 seconds. Stacks cannot be applied at the same time.

equipBonuses.name: Perilous Attraction
equipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your target is pulled towards you for 3 seconds. Applies to a single target and does not stack. Control Immune targets suffer a 20 magnitude Bleed over its duration. Can only occur once every 10 seconds. (Not usable in PVP)

equipBonuses.name: Soul Siphon
equipBonuses.description: Your powers have a 10% chance to siphon life essence from your target, creating a nearby healing orb which can be picked up to restore 3% of your Maximum Hit Points over 5 seconds. (20 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Veiled Barricade
equipBonuses.description: Receiving damage from an enemy increases your Defense by 1000 but reduces your Accuracy by 1000. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Gluttonous Might
equipBonuses.description: Increases damage dealt by 5%. Decreases incoming healing by 25%.

equipBonuses.name: Elegant Reply
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Deflect an attack, you have a 30% chance to reflect 5% of the damage back to the attacker. This effect may only occur once every 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Charged Might
equipBonuses.description: When Action Points are full, your Power is increased by 5000.

equipBonuses.name: Bloodletting
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you Critically Strike with your Powers, you have a 10% chance to reduce your Maximum Hit Points by 20% and gain 3% Damage for 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Reckless Brutality
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal damage to an enemy gain a stack of Reckless Brutality, increasing your Power by 1000 but increasing your damage taken by 2% for 5 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)
